backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (design system, navbar, hero, social proof, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing the purpose and key implementation details of every component and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vocal Trace React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full landing page by composing Navbar, ScrollTrailMotif, HeroSection, SocialProofBar, HowItWorksSection, FeatureShowcase, TestimonialSection, and FooterCTA in order.
Alternating left-right feature showcase section rendering two rounded cards (Tactile Feedback and Safe Exploration) each with an image, subtitle, headline, description, and highlight pill.
frontend/src/components/FooterCTA.tsx: Final CTA section with a bold headline, Magic Jelly button, and a dark navy footer containing the logo, nav links, copyright, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section featuring a bold navy headline, sub-headline, Magic Jelly CTA button, mini stats row, split-screen image panel, and decorative background blobs.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Renders a three-step 'How It Works' section with cards for Listen, Interact, and Grow, each featuring an emoji icon, numbered badge, and description.
frontend/src/components/MagicJellyButton: A reusable button component with three size variants (sm/md/lg) that applies a 'magic-jelly-btn' CSS class and supports disabled state.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, smooth-scroll desktop nav links, a CTA button, and an animated hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/ScrollTrailMotif: A fixed left-side scroll progress indicator that displays 24 dots, highlighting and scaling the active dot based on scroll position.
frontend/src/components/SocialProofBar.t: Displays a row of grayscale trust badges (Parent's Choice, Speech Pathology, STEM Kids) inside a rounded card to convey credibility.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialSecti: Renders a testimonials section with one featured gradient quote card and two smaller mini-testimonial cards from parents.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS for the Vocal Trace app, defining brand color tokens (navy, teal, cream), Tailwind base/component/utility layers, and custom component styles including the Magic Jelly button with 3D gummy effects and section card layouts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Vocal Trace brand colors, custom fonts (Nunito/Nunito Sans), jelly border radii, teal glow box shadows, and mappings for shadcn UI CSS variable tokens.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the Vocal Trace landing page build, including architectural notes (color palette, border-radius rules, Magic Jelly UI), required image assets with dimensions, and a list of already-implemented features.
